rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAGILAVY FAMILY TRUST ESTABLISHED JUNE 5, 1989 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration: Approval To Record Notice Of Pendency Of Action
rulings.Rulings: The Motion for Reconsideration is denied. Petitioner presents no new facts or law within the meaning of CCP section 1008. Any such facts or law could have been presented prior to the Court's May 5, 2016 denial of Petitioner's ex parte petition had Petitioner exercised reasonable diligence. In any event, even if the Court were to consider the arguments now presented, the requested relief would still be denied, because the Petition does not state a real property claim as opposed to a beneficiary's claims with respect to the trustee's alleged mishandling of property belonging to the trust. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Wednesday, July 13, 2016.
